subcodes.title: Words to Sigurd Russell et al, spoken on 1904-04-14
subcodes.first_line: His condition, there, in the world of spirit is the same as it was here! While here, his eyes were not opened to the real spiritual light
subcodes.subjects: @priestcraft, @station of the Manifestation of God, @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
